title: file-header
description: "Require a configured source header."
sidebar:
  badge:
    text: note
    class: severity-indicator severity-note

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-note" aria-hidden="true"></span> `note`

Require a configured source header. Strider default: no required header.

## Bad

```go
package service // when a copyright header is required
```

## Good

```go
// Copyright Example Corp.
package service
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only file-header`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
